exercises.title: Create and Print an Array
exercises.instructions:
Create an array called fruits containing these 5 items, in order:
"apple", "banana", "cherry", "date", "elder".
Then print it using JSON.stringify().
exercises.starter_code:
let fruits = [];

// Add the fruits and print with JSON.stringify

exercises.title: Access Array Elements
exercises.instructions: Given numbers = [10, 20, 30, 40, 50], print the first, third, and last elements.
exercises.starter_code:
let numbers = [10, 20, 30, 40, 50];

// Print first, third, and last
